overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a narrow, neon-lit alleyway in a futuristic dystopian city. The scene transitions from a dark, enclosed alley with market stalls and neon signs to a sunlit street level via a concrete stairway, featuring gritty urban details and scattered trash.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cyberpunk alley with neon signs and market stalls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow alley, passing blue neon signs and vendor stalls on either side

entered.detail: vertical blue neon sign with glowing characters mounted on the left wall
large green mat or carpet lying on the ground in the alley center
golden-colored food stall with reflective surfaces on the right side
wall covered in red and white graffiti tags on the right side
metal scaffolding structure with pipes and platforms on the left

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking through a narrow, enclosed cyberpunk alley. Blue neon signs illuminate the left wall while a golden food stall and graffiti-covered wall line the right. The ground is asphalt with scattered debris, and the space feels tight and industrial with metal scaffolding visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: alley transition zone with trash accumulation and increasing sunlight

events.description: walks into a strong beam of morning sunlight illuminating the alley floor

agents.ego_description: continuing through the alley, approaching the sunlit exit while navigating around trash piles

entered.detail: large yellow industrial container or dumpster on the left side
piles of garbage bags and scattered debris accumulated on the right
red and white striped concrete barriers blocking part of the right side

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the alley where sunlight begins to penetrate the narrow space. Yellow industrial containers appear on the left while trash bags and concrete barriers line the right. The lighting shifts dramatically as the camera approaches the alley exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairway exit leading from alley to street level

events.description: begins ascending concrete stairs to exit the narrow alley onto the street level

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs and ramp to exit the alley, approaching the street level

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near the hotel entrance at the top of the stairs

entered.detail: vertical pink neon sign reading HOTEL mounted on the left building facade
wide concrete stairs with red and white striped edges leading upward
opening to the main street visible at the top of the stairway

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the ascent from the alley via concrete stairs to street level. A pink neon HOTEL sign becomes prominent on the left as the camera climbs. The environment opens up to reveal the street above, with concrete barriers now visible in the distance and an urban overpass structure ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a claustrophobic, neon-lit alleyway toward the open brightness of a futuristic street level. It begins by navigating a tight industrial corridor where blue neon signs and a golden food stall contrast against graffiti-covered walls and asphalt debris. As the camera moves deeper, the enclosed space begins to brighten with penetrating sunlight, shifting the focus toward yellow industrial containers and concrete barriers. The scene then transitions into an ascent via concrete stairs, passing a prominent pink neon hotel sign as the perspective climbs. Finally, the environment opens up completely to reveal the street above, featuring distant concrete barriers and a looming urban overpass.
